error_signature: Header name must be a valid HTTP token
title: Invalid HTTP token error in DataforSEO node
symptom: When testing the DataforSEO HTTP request node, an error states 'Header name must be a valid HTTP token'. This indicates an issue with the authorization method being used.
applies_when: Authorization method is set to Header Auth
not_this_if: Using Basic Auth as the authorization method
root_cause: The error occurs because the DataforSEO API requires Basic Authentication instead of Header Authentication. When Header Auth is used, the email is incorrectly treated as a header name, leading to the invalid token error.
fix_steps: Change the Authorization method to 'Basic Auth'
Enter your email and API key as credentials
Save the workflow and test the node again
agent_instruction: Switch the authorization method to 'Basic Auth' in the DataforSEO node settings.
